scripts.deploy:db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute abs-data-prod --file=data/abs/migrations/001_add_reports.sql --remote && wrangler d1 execute abs-data-prod --file=data/abs/migrations/002_add_auth.sql --remote
scripts.deploy:demoreport: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://abs-api.eddie-p-halterman.workers.dev pnpm --filter @abs/demoreport build && wrangler pages deploy apps/demoreport/out --project-name demoreport --branch main
scripts.deploy:grantdata: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://abs-api.eddie-p-halterman.workers.dev pnpm --filter @abs/grantdata build && wrangler pages deploy apps/grantdata/out --project-name grantdata --branch main
scripts.deploy: pnpm run deploy:api && pnpm run deploy:demoreport && pnpm run deploy:grantdata
